fit._comment: The 20 LIVE inversion params from the 2026-06-23 PCA sensitivity run (session inversion_03) = all 33 minus the 13 dead/negligible ones. FROZEN (left out, stay at preset): the whole wb_low family (WB_LOW_DESAT, WB_LOW_BAND_PCT[0/1], WB_LOW_PRIOR[0/1/2]) + the non-binding patch guards (SHADOW_MIN_LUMA, PATCH_CHROMA_MAX, PATCH_CHROMA_FLOOR, PATCH_LUMA_FLOOR, MIN_PATCH_DENSITY, HIGHLIGHT_CLIP_FRAC_MAX, WB_REGION_MIN_FRAC). Ordered by sensitivity rank. NOTE: PATCH_WIN_FRAC/PATCH_STRIDE_DIV are high-leverage but discontinuous (patch-winner flips) so can overfit 2 rolls; PRINT_CLIP_BUDGET is a safety knob (tuning it down trades EMD for clipping). Validate across rolls before adopting.

comment: test running inversion on less params after pca run detected 13 non important params
